turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Oh, um, okay that's fine with me. Yeah, I'm calling to try and schedule my annual physical exam—do you have any openings sometime next week?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I just need to confirm your date of birth. Could you please provide your date of birth?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Sure, it's March 15th, 1978. Is that all you need, or...?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: That's all I need for now.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Great, um, so do you have any times available next week for the physical?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Do you have a preferred provider for your annual physical exam?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Um, I'm not sure what you mean by that. Do you mean like, a specific doctor? I don't really have a preference—whoever's available works for me. Can you just find me an opening next week?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me check for any provider's availability for your

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Yeah, take your time. I'm just looking for whenever works, like I said—anytime next week is fine with me.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: annual physical exam next week. One moment.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Okay, sounds good. I'll wait.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I found several openings for your annual physical exam next week.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Oh great! Um, what times do you have available? And which days, if you don't mind?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: On Monday, June 29, you can see

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Wait, um, I'm sorry—did you say June? I thought we were looking at next week. Today's March 15th, right? That's like three months away. Do you have anything sooner, like next week in March?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: On Monday, June 20

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Um, I'm confused. June 20th is still way too far out. I need something next week—like the week of March 20th or so. Do you have any openings then instead?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: today is actually June today is June 23.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Oh! Oh okay, um, I apologize for the confusion. So today is June 23rd? Alright, so next week would be like June 29th and beyond then, right? So yeah, Monday June 29th could work for me. What time slots do you have available that day?
